title: Add an Action Button to a Lightning Page

blocks.content: An Executable Action Button can be added to a Lightning page so users can run it directly from the page.
For example, a Close Case Action Button can appear on the Case record page for open cases.

children.content: Open the record page where you want to add the component.
In the Lightning Components panel, locate Executable Action Button under Custom – Managed.
Drag the component onto the page.
Configure the component in the component properties panel.
